_meta.description: Audit markers — tracks which files have been audited, when, and how many times. Future Claude Code sessions should read this file before auditing and increment the count.
_meta.usage: Before auditing a file, check if it has a marker. After auditing, update the marker. Higher auditCount = lower priority for re-audit.
_meta.format: { filepath: { auditCount, lastAuditDate, lastAuditSession, findings, status } }

routes/crafting.js.findings: Cycle 3: Clean. craftLock, requireAuth, tavern rest block. Pre-validation BEFORE deduction: gold check, material check, inventory cap check, slot recipe per-item caps. Gold sync dual-field. Batch crafting with gray recipe block. Cooldown with legendary reduction. Moonlight bonus. Transmute shared cooldown. Faction rep check. Profession slot limit by player level.

routes/shop.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. shopBuyLock, self-check, buff cap 50, faction+talent discount, applyShopEffect covers 15 effect types, gold/currency buy, rift extend guard, workshop upgrades with tier validation.

routes/gems.js.findings: Wave 41: Race condition + data integrity deep-dive. All 5 POST endpoints (socket/unsocket/upgrade/unlock-socket/polish) share a single gemLock. Lock acquired before any state mutation, released in finally. Input validation on all endpoints: parseGemKey checks, ownership checks, socketIndex bounds, gold+essenz balance checks before deduction. Unsocket: gemPreserve legendary effect correctly applies random chance. Clean.

routes/enchanting.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. enchantLock on reroll+disenchant. Gold sync. rerollLocked stat validation. 3-option reroll with preview. Locked item check on disenchant.

routes/schmiedekunst.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. schmiedeLock on all 5 POSTs. Gold sync on transmute+reforge+reforge-stats. Locked/equipped item checks on dismantle+dismantle-all+transmute. Inventory cap on transmute result. Affix reroll with moonlight bonus.

routes/social.js.findings: HIGH FIXED: 6 challenge endpoints moved to central store (state.socialData.challenges). Challenge auth+XSS+gold fixes. Trade counter-offer materials fix. 4 zombie buff types wired. Friendship required for challenges.

routes/quests.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. questCompleteLock, requireApiKey, tavern rest block, campaign sequential ordering, NPC per-player completion with claim-first guard, temp field cleanup after onQuestCompletedByUser, chain quest unlock, pool management with Fisher-Yates shuffle, input validation (title 500, desc 5000). Core quest flow verified end-to-end.

routes/gacha.js.findings: Wave 40: Deep race-condition + exploit audit. Pull locks (acquirePullLock) are per-player, cover both /pull and /pull10, released in finally blocks. No cross-endpoint leak. Inventory cap checked before pulls. 10-pull epic guarantee correctly removes replaced item from inventory (skips if duplicate). Epic pity reset on guarantee works. Mid-loop pool-empty refund is proportional to 10-pull cost (player-favorable edge case, not exploitable). Duplicate detection uses base itemId (correct). No achievements crash can block pull (try/catch). Clean.

routes/battlepass.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. Season rotation, locks, claim guards, grantBattlePassXP talent bonus, all reward types. No issues found.

routes/factions.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. Locks, auth, daily quest progress, standing migration, weekly bonus auto-reset, legendary+talent rep multipliers. weeklyBonusMax=3 hardcoded but consistent.

routes/expedition.js.findings: Cycle 3: MED FIXED: checkpoint rewards had xp field in data but XP was never granted — only gold/currencies processed. Added u.xp += rewards.xp. Prior fixes hold: expClaimLock, min-1-contribution guard, double-claim.

routes/challenges-weekly.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. Claim lock, double-claim guard (completedStages check), star calculation with speed bonus + legendary challengeScoreBonus, modifier system with effective progress tracking, milestone claim with cumulative star check. Week rotation deterministic.

routes/dungeons.js.findings: Wave 42: Race condition deep-dive. 3 locks: dungeonCreateLock (create), dungeonJoinLock (join), collectLock (collect rewards). All per-player with finally-block release. Join: maxPlayers check + push is synchronous in Node single-thread → no cross-player race. Double-join guarded by participants.includes(uid). Cancel: no lock but safe (creator-only check + forming-only + Node atomicity). Collect: collected.push(uid) happens BEFORE success calc to prevent partial state. Double-collect guarded by collected.includes. Clean.

routes/world-boss.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. wbClaimLock, wbBoostLock, double-claim guard (rewardsClaimed), level check WB_MIN_LEVEL=15, tavern rest check, unique drop ownership check, contribution-proportional rewards, auto-spawn/expiry, mondstaub boost with max-1 guard, boss-specific gear from FULL_GEAR_ITEMS.

routes/mail.js.findings: CRIT FIXED: item duplication exploit via duplicate itemIds. HIGH FIXED: expired mail pruning destroyed uncollected items. LOW FIXED: _mailsSent tracking after saveUsers. Added type validation on itemIds elements.

routes/kanais-cube.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. cubeExtractLock+cubeEquipLock. Locked item check. Gold sync. Escalating cost by extraction count. Max 3 equipped passives. Unique+BoP check.

routes/talent-tree.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. talentLock on allocate/deallocate/reset. canAllocate: maxRank check, available points, reqPoints, prerequisites, exclusions, choice groups with maxPicks. Respec cost gold+essenz with gold sync. getUserTalentEffects exported for cross-system use.

routes/adventure-tome.js.findings: Cycle 3: Clean. tomeClaimLock, milestone double-claim guard, gold sync, objective stat tracking against user fields. Prior race condition + gold desync fixes hold.

routes/users.js.findings: Cycle 2: Clean. authLimiter 10/min, bcrypt password hash, timing-safe legacy API key compare, sensitive field stripping (passwordHash/apiKey/refreshTokens/resetToken/emailVerifyToken), JWT token pair generation, refresh token rotation, email validation regex, password policy (8+ chars, uppercase, number).

routes/currency.js.findings: Cycle 3: Deep read. currencyLock on convert. dailyLock on claim. Admin-only earn. Self-check on spend/convert. Conversion: pair whitelist + 20% tax + received<=0 guard. Daily fortune random rewards. Amount 1M cap. Berlin TZ. BP XP on login.

hooks/useQuestActions.ts.findings: Wave 48: Inconsistent retry behavior on network errors. 4 actions have onRetry callback (claim, unclaim, coop-complete, complete). 7 do NOT (approve, reject, favorite toggle, coop-claim, pool refresh, purchase, gear purchase). Adding blanket retry is risky — purchase is NOT idempotent, retrying a successful purchase that timed out reading response could double-charge. FLAGGED (requires backend-behavior audit per endpoint). All non-network errors have proper d.error fallback. loadingAction state prevents double-clicks. Overall sound.

components/ItemTooltip.tsx.findings: Wave 22: Lock indicator raw title= -> <Tip k="item_lock"> (policy fix). Socket title "Empty" -> "Empty socket" / "{gem} gem" for clarity. Set ID raw printed (e.g. "adventurer") -> formatSetLabel() with generic-tier labels + kebab-case pretty-print for named sets. Added maxHeight 80vh + overflowY:auto on tooltip body to prevent viewport overflow when item has many stats+sockets+legendary+flavor.

lib/email.js.findings: Wave 25: Doc/code env-var mismatch fixed. CLAUDE.md+.env.example documented AGENTMAIL_FROM (full email) but code read AGENTMAIL_USERNAME. resolveUsername() now accepts both (extracts username from FROM if full email, falls back to USERNAME, then default). No breaking change. User-facing tone: plain functional templates -> full Skulduggery-tone per user decision. Subject lines unchanged (spam-filter-safe). Password reset + verification emails now match in-world Hall voice.

lib/companion-config.ts.findings: Wave 28: Clean. 36-line config utility. 12 companion types all have color entries. "other" pet type falls back to DEFAULT_COMPANION_COLOR. No user-facing strings. No a11y concerns.
